title: [Apache Flink 1.13.2 Released](</2021/08/06/apache-flink-1.13.2-released/>)
summary:
#  Apache Flink 1.13.2 Released
August 6, 2021 - Yun Tang
The Apache Flink community released the second bugfix version of the Apache Flink 1.13 series.
This release includes 127 fixes and minor improvements for Flink 1.13.2. The list below…
